title: LoveForGreatswords
description: Replaces sword textures and models with larger greatsword models, while keeping somewhat consistent with vanilla's artstyle
body:
![Golden Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6rTj4oKW/images/78a142f9c29900e4e8a405a48c112b516e87d1f9.png)

Ever felt like the regular size of swords in Vanilla was too small and puny? This resource pack will double their size ~~and give it to the next person~~.

![Netherite Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6rTj4oKW/images/b2ff266be9938b204af0d2b2d01dd56bbfc9364c.png)

Every tier of greatsword has its own special identity, thanks to different details and decorations. All textures are animated, and if you don't like a particular sword texture, you can switch some of them out for other alternative textures packaged with the rest.

![Swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6rTj4oKW/images/dc361da66e4d5ef97dec61409d8e3753be6a1693.png)
